caption: The video appears to be a news broadcast, likely from an Indian channel, as indicated by the Hindi text and the ANI (All India Radio) logo on the microphone. The reporter is standing outdoors in what seems to be a park or a similar open area with trees and grass in the background. He is holding a microphone and speaking into it, presumably delivering breaking news. The headline at the top of the screen reads "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है," which translates to "Congress shaken up, Tejaswi's 'picture' remains." The lower third of the screen displays the words "BREAKING NEWS" in bold yellow letters, emphasizing the urgency of the report. The time displayed is 10:02 PM, suggesting that this is a late-night news segment. The overall tone of the video suggests a significant political development being reported live.
